title: A coherent public producer extension is feasible
description: Validated by the 2026-07-20 disposable .NET 10 A3 spike. Across 1000 forced correction races, the current independent budget.position.get then ledger.actuals.query control mixed producer generations 1000 times. A BUDGET-owned composite read that captured one immutable LEDGER actuals snapshot and reused it for both the canonical BudgetPositionCalculator and returned dated members produced 1000 coherent pre-correction and 1000 coherent post-correction results, with zero mixed generations and zero reconciliation failures. The viable public shape is budget.insights.evidence.get as recorded by DD-INSIGHTS-COHERENT-PUBLIC-EVIDENCE; it needs no private INSIGHTS access, duplicate position calculation, daemon, or second source of truth. Production conformance remains an implementation gate.
